In the framework of the administrative modernisation " Stadt Wien intern " is a vital communication and information platform, and helps to enhance a corporate identity among the employees of the Vienna City Administration. One major task of the employee newsletter is to publish a list of current job offers available within the City Administration. Bei der Stadt Wien findest du Aufgaben mit Sinn.
